notes:
Note 1. This list does not include applications that have failed sift and therefore were not considered by the panel
Note 2. Early Career and Standard Route applications are assessed under the same criteria and graded and ranked alongside each other at the panel meeting. As part of our commitment to ensuring a slightly higher success rate for the early career route, early career proposals ranked lower than standard proposals are sometimes funded
